metadata.description: Use AI with your data, safely. Connect a desktop AI to your encrypted ParrotIt vault — read and save your details on demand, decrypted only on your own machine, with every action logged and revocable.

plugins.name: parrotit
plugins.description: Your desktop AI reads and saves details from your encrypted ParrotIt vault on demand — decrypted only on your device, every read and save logged, revocable any time. Sensitive data and saving are off by default.
